bring_home.title: Pack your End spoils for return — Elytra, Shulker Boxes (8+), Dragon Breath (32+), Echo Shards, Dragon Egg

return_portal.title: Return through the End portal to the Overworld — you are coming home with the End behind you

subtitle.text: The End is cleared. The void is mapped. The dragon is farmed. You have everything. Time to go home.

description: CH.14 · BEFORE THE HOMECOMING
▸ Ch15 is called After the Dragon.
It is the homecoming chapter.
Everything from Ch13-14 returns with you.
The Elytra. The Shulker Boxes. The dragon food.
The Echo Shards. The Dragon Egg. The Baby Trigon.
The Return is not an end.
It is the beginning of what the End made possible.
◈ RETURN CHECKLIST — WHAT TO BRING
└ ✦ Elytra: equipped (most important single item)
└ ✦ Shulker Boxes: 8+ minimum (27 is the target)
Load each box with a purpose-category of items
└ ✦ Dragon Breath: 32+ bottles (Lingering Potion fuel)
└ ✦ Dragon Egg: carry it — Ch14/15 research + display item
Do NOT leave it in the End (only one per world)
└ ✦ Echo Shards: 8+ (Recovery Compass already crafted?)
└ ✦ Shulker Shells: 20+ for future Shulker Box production
└ ✦ Baby Trigon: bring your companion home
◈ WHAT CHANGES IN CH15
└ Ch15 opens settlement/kingdom building content
└ Serene Seasons full cycle: farming + seasonal mechanics
└ Antique Atlas completion: map the world you traveled
└ Puffish Skills mastery: unlock full skill trees
└ MCA Reborn kingdom: the companions you left behind
└ Celestisynth prep: rare material chains begin in Ch15-16
└ Elytra is the transportation revolution: the Overworld is
now navigable at full speed — use it
◈ RETURN MECHANICS
└ End portal return: stand in the central fountain ring
(the same portal the dragon was guarding)
└ You see the end poem. Skip it or read it.
(The poem says: you have been here before. It is right.)
└ Return destination: your last Overworld respawn point
(not your bed — your last respawn anchor or spawn)
└ If Comforts is active: ensure a sleeping bag or hammock
is set as spawn before entering End, to control return point
▸ Frieren walked back from the Demon King's castle.
The journey home is not the epilogue.
The journey home is the second arc.
You have killed the dragon.
You have mapped the void.
You have farmed what the void grows.
Now you return.
What comes after that
is the rest of the story.
▶ Pack your End spoils for the homecoming [check]
▶ Return through the End portal to the Overworld [check]
◇ Ch15 (After the Dragon) begins when you return.
The tab unlocks via the ch14_gate dependency chain.
The world is different now.
Elytra flight changes all overland travel.
The kingdom you left behind is still there.
The seasons have been turning without you.
Go see what changed.
